results.scenario_name: /help on a fresh PR — list supported commands
results.judge_summary: Agent failed to reply at all; it did not list the three supported commands as required.

results.scenario_name: /ask references a prior thread reply — must read it
results.judge_summary: The agent did not produce any reply text, failing to address the user's question about whether legacy import is the only place where order.getItems() can still be null.

results.scenario_name: Unknown /command — agent must say 'not supported' and list options
results.judge_summary: Agent provided no reply text at all. The user requested '/improve', but the agent did not respond, thus failing to mention any required terms or address the command. The only acceptable action was to state that '/improve' is unsupported and list supported commands, which was not done.
